name: SKAND.ENSK. 15/23 MTN
summary: SKAND.ENSK. 15/23 MTN refers to a Medium Term Note (MTN) issued by Skandinaviska Enskilda Banken (SEB) with a maturity date in 2023 and issuance year of 2015. MTNs are debt instruments that allow companies to raise capital over a specific period. SEB is a leading Nordic financial services group.
